channel.title: Playbooks on MENSHLY GLOBAL
channel.description: Recent content in Playbooks on MENSHLY GLOBAL

item.title: The AI Automation Agency Playbook
item.description:
This is not a blog post condensed into a PDF. This is an operating system for building an AI automation agency from zero to $50,000/month in recurring revenue. Every module contains exact procedures — not theories, not possibilities, not “consider doing X.” You will do X, in this order, with these tools, and you will verify it worked before moving on.

47 procedures. 12 modules. 8+ hours of reading and execution. If you complete every procedure, you will have a functioning agency with paying clients. If you skip procedures, you will have a folder of half-finished projects and no revenue. The choice is yours.

item.title: AI Side Hustle Blueprint
item.description:
What’s Inside

This playbook is the distillation of 18 months of research into what actually works when building an AI-powered side hustle. Not theory. Not possibilities. Verified, repeatable business models that real people are using to generate income right now.

The 25 Validated Models

Each model includes: the exact tools you need, the startup cost (most are under $50), the realistic first-month revenue expectation, and the step-by-step process to get your first paying customer. Models range from AI content agencies and chatbot building services to AI-powered data analysis consulting and automated lead generation systems.

item.title: Automation Agency Starter Kit
item.description:
Why an Automation Agency

Every business on earth is drowning in manual processes. Emails that should be automated. Data that should flow between systems without human intervention. Reports that should generate themselves. The demand for automation expertise vastly exceeds the supply of qualified providers. This starter kit gives you everything you need to capture that demand.

Client Acquisition Scripts

The hardest part of starting any service business is getting clients. This kit includes word-for-word outreach scripts for cold email, LinkedIn, and cold calling — all tested and optimized for automation agency services. Also included: proposal templates, case study frameworks, and a client qualification checklist so you never waste time on bad-fit prospects.

item.title: ChatGPT Prompt Engineering Guide
item.description:
The Art and Science of Prompts

Prompt engineering isn’t about clever tricks or secret formulas. It’s about communicating clearly with a powerful but literal-minded assistant. This guide teaches you the systematic approach to crafting prompts that consistently produce high-quality outputs, regardless of the AI model you’re using.

The Framework

Every effective prompt follows the CRISP framework: Context (background information), Role (who the AI should be), Instructions (specific tasks), Specifications (format, length, tone), and Parameters (constraints and preferences). This guide walks you through each element with real examples and common pitfalls.
